unverified_claims.note: The 5-year backward growth figure is derived by extrapolating from the 2026 market size ($85.35B, per Coherent Market Insights) using the documented 26.3% CAGR backward 5 years: $85.35B / (1.263)^5 ≈ $26.5B in 2021. Growth = ($85.35B - $26.5B) / $26.5B ≈ 222%. No single source explicitly states the 2021 ambient computing market baseline. The extrapolation methodology is conservative; actual 2021 market was smaller if growth accelerated in 2022+ post-ChatGPT, which would imply higher 5Y growth.

No quarterly (sequential Q-over-Q) growth figure was available for the ambient computing market as a whole. The +26% figure represents the documented annual growth rate (2025→2026) and is used as the best available proxy for recent 3-month momentum. The actual Q1 2026 vs Q1 2025 growth rate was not published by any source at the time of research (May 21, 2026).

No primary keyword research tool (Keywords Everywhere, Ahrefs, SEMrush) was directly queried. The 60,000/month estimate is based on the compound search interest for 'ambient computing' (moderate), 'smart home AI' (high), 'ambient intelligence' (moderate), and related ambient device searches. Actual figure may be significantly higher when aggregating all related ambient computing keyword variants.

unverified_claims.claim: 52% of global transactions via ambient sensors by end of 2026
unverified_claims.note: This figure appeared in multiple ambient computing overview articles but the primary source (likely a payments research firm) was not directly accessible to verify. Treat as directional indicator rather than confirmed statistic. The claim refers to next-generation ambient payment methods using biometrics and ambient sensors handling 52% of global e-commerce and in-store transactions.

The 10% figure appears in smart home platform market share breakdowns attributing the remaining share after Google (30%), Amazon (25%), Apple (20%), and Samsung (15%) to open-source/other platforms. Home Assistant is the dominant open-source player in this residual segment. The specific 10% attribution to Home Assistant alone is an estimate; the 10% may include other smaller platforms.

unverified_claims.claim: Three class action lawsuits against ambient retail analytics vendors in Q1 2026
unverified_claims.note: Referenced in legal analysis of ambient computing regulatory risk but the specific number (three) and the identity of the defendants were not confirmed in directly accessible primary sources at time of research. The general trend of rising class action risk for ambient data collection without explicit consent is well-documented across CCPA and BIPA (Illinois Biometric Information Privacy Act) litigation records.
